title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
statement:
Given an integer array `nums`, return the length of the longest **strictly increasing subsequence**.

A subsequence is a sequence derived from the array by deleting some elements without changing the order of the remaining elements.

**Input:** Space-separated integers representing the array.
**Output:** Print the length of the longest increasing subsequence.

examples.explanation: No strictly increasing subsequence longer than 1.
